   "source": [
    "# Segment Analysis: Visualization\n",
    "\n",
    "`SegmentTable` provides rich plotting features, specifically optimized for comparing spectra over multiple segments via `overlay_spectra()`.\n",
    "\n",
    "The segment boundaries are still `gwpy.segments.Segment`, and the spectra being overlaid are GWpy `FrequencySeries` objects. gwexpy adds the table-oriented visualization layer by collecting those GWpy base classes in `SegmentTable` and providing overlay, color grading, and overview layouts on top. For the base relationship between GWpy classes and gwexpy extensions, see [SegmentTable: Basics](intro_segment_table.ipynb).\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "d0397f17",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-25T09:06:56.837026Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-25T09:06:56.836330Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-25T09:07:06.039553Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-25T09:07:06.038364Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 9.209235,
     "end_time": "2026-04-25T09:07:06.040193+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-25T09:06:56.830958+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "with warnings.catch_warnings():\n",
    "    warnings.simplefilter('ignore')\n",
    "\n",
    "    import numpy as np\n",
    "    from gwpy.frequencyseries import FrequencySeries\n",
    "    from gwpy.segments import Segment\n",
    "\n",
    "    from gwexpy.table import SegmentTable\n",
    "\n",
    "    def make_fs(i):\n",
    "        f = np.linspace(1, 32, 256)\n",
    "        data = (1.0/(f**1.5)) * (1.0 + i*0.1)\n",
    "        return FrequencySeries(data, frequencies=f)\n",
    "\n",
    "    segs = [Segment(i*100, i*100+100) for i in range(10)]\n",
    "    st = SegmentTable.from_segments(segs, snr=np.random.uniform(5, 20, 10))\n",
    "    st.add_series_column(\"asd\", data=[make_fs(i) for i in range(10)], kind=\"frequencyseries\")\n",
    "\n",
    "    # 1. Overlay spectra graded by start time (default)\n",
    "    plot = st.overlay_spectra(\"asd\", color_by=\"t0\")\n",
    "    plot\n"
   ]
  },

   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "31c333a6",

   "source": [
    "## Color Grading by Meta Column\n",
    "\n",
    "You can color individual lines based on any numeric meta column (e.g., SNR)."
   ]
  },

   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "d9bc235c",

   "source": [
    "plot = st.overlay_spectra(\"asd\", color_by=\"snr\", cmap=\"plasma\")\n",
    "plot"
   ]

   "source": [
    "## Overview Layouts\n",
    "\n",
    "Use `segments()` to see the temporal layout of your table."
   ]
  },
